Accounts Receivable Aging Report — November 2023: Total outstanding receivables stand at $6.8 million as of November 30, 2023. Of this balance, $4.1 million is current (under 30 days), $1.6 million is 31–60 days past due, and $1.1 million is over 60 days. The collections team has initiated escalation procedures for three accounts totaling $420,000 that are over 90 days delinquent. Management is reviewing whether to engage a third-party collection agency for the oldest balances.
